notes:
v1.3.1 Hotfix
🐛 Per-Character Dialogue Startup: Opening the VN overlay with Per-Character Dialogue Panels enabled no longer shows an empty shared dialogue box before any character speaks.
🐛 Shared Dialogue Transitions: Narration and off-stage speakers temporarily use the shared dialogue box. Character panels return with their previous text and order when a staged character speaks again.

v1.3.0 Feature Update
🌸 Character Dialogue Boxes & Backlog: Give every staged character their own persistent dialogue box, then review, search, and export the current session history as TXT or self-contained HTML.
🎬 Live Director Controls: Choose the GM and active players independently, hide character dock names, lock player stage controls, and present prepared choices without the player-written choice field.
🔗 Relationship Tracker: Active-GM Stories can change progress through a dedicated action, and eligible users can open the selected Actor's Manager from the Live character right-click popup.
⚙️ Settings & Presentation: A tabbed Settings Center, reusable portrait thumbnails, dialogue box styling, and new Indigo Fantasy and Elegant Gold location plates are included.
🐛 Fixes: Preview privacy, Region Party View, GM Select validation, player-only Live mode return, long speaker names, and location labels without theme assets have been corrected.

announcement.title: 🌸 Visual Novel Maker v1.3.1
announcement.content:
Visual Novel Maker v1.3.1 fixes Per-Character Dialogue Panel startup and transitions.

  • Opening the overlay no longer shows an empty shared dialogue box before any character speaks.
  • Narration and off-stage speakers temporarily use the shared dialogue box. Character panels return with their previous text and order when a staged character speaks again.

Visual Novel Maker v1.3.0 added a persistent dialogue box for each staged character, a searchable session backlog, separate Live Director targets for the GM and players, and player stage control locks.

  • Run prepared Stories for everyone, selected players, players only, or the GM only.
  • Give staged characters persistent dialogue boxes and hide character dock name labels globally or per character.
  • Lock player stage controls and hide the player-written choice field when a scene should use prepared choices only.
  • Review, search, and export the current session history as TXT or self-contained HTML.
  • Change Stylish Relationship Tracker progress from an active-GM Story action, or open the selected Actor's Manager from the Live character right-click popup when permitted.
  • Includes a tabbed Settings Center, shared portrait thumbnail reuse, two new theme location plates, and six targeted fixes.
